study_group_representative.quote: Our estimation of Rt also has some limitations. First, the estimation of Rt was based on the reported case number only.

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: We employed a method proposed by Cori et al.1 to estimate Rt in 10 selected countries, namely Belgium, China, France, Germany, Iran, South Korea, Spain, Thailand, USA and UK...

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: In this study, the number of daily confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the selected countries were obtained from the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University

follow_up_length_reported.quote: Figure 1A—J illustrates the time series of the estimated Rt on weekly windows... starting from the date at which the number of cumulative confirmed cases in each country exceeds 100... as of 7 April 2020

outcome_assessors_blinded.quote: We employed a method proposed by Cori et al.1 to estimate Rt in 10 selected countries... using the EpiEstim Microsoft Excel spreadsheet

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: The time-varying reproduction number, Rt, is the average number of secondary cases of disease caused by an infected individual over his or her infectious period.

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: Finally, country-to-country comparisons of the effectiveness of control measures are problematic due to many confounding factors, such as different population sizes and densities, superspreading events, social mixing patterns and nuances in social distancing measures. Large-scale epidemiological evaluations of the impact of different public health measures dependent on countries‘ characteristics will be needed in the future.

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: We also calculated the reduction in Rt (ΔRt): a higher ΔRt is indicative of more successful control measures.
